name: Beanstalk
description: Beanstalk — Hosted Git and SVN code repository with deployment pipelines and code review tools for small teams.

seo.title: Beanstalk — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: Beanstalk: Beanstalk — Hosted Git and SVN code repository with deployment pipelines and code review tools for small teams.

when_to_use: Deploy to staging/production on Git push
Code review workflow with deployment lock controls
SVN hosting with branch-based deployment pipelines
Automated FTP/SFTP deploys for small team projects

pros: Deployment pipelines built in, not bolted on
Supports both Git and SVN repositories
Clean code review UI for small teams
cons: No modern CI runners, only FTP/SSH deploys
Weak issue tracking, forces external tools
Storage and repo limits feel tight
review.verdict: A throwback to 2012 hosted Git/SVN that still works for tiny agencies, but little reason to pick new.
review.best_for: Small agencies deploying PHP/WordPress via FTP who want SVN plus Git in one place.
review.not_for: Teams needing modern CI, containers, or active product development.
